description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node Docker image and no services. Define a global before_script that runs `which npm`, `npm -v`, installs openssh-client if `ssh-agent` is missing, starts ssh-agent, adds the `$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY` via `ssh-add <(echo \"$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY\")`, prints a success message, creates `~/.ssh`, and if running in Docker writes a SSH config disabling strict host key checking. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a `compile` job that executes `pwd`, `echo \"Get typescript for build\"`, `npm install typescript -g`, `which tsc`, `tsc -v`, `echo \"Get deps and compile\"`, `npm install --silent`, and `tsc`. In the deploy stage add a `publish` job with environment `production` that runs only on the `master` branch and executes `pwd`, `echo \"Trigger a deploy.\"`, `echo \"ecosystem.config.js...\"`, `cat ecosystem.config.js`, `npm i -g pm2`, and `pm2 deploy ecosystem.config.js production`.
